Milestone 5 — Administration

US-4.1

User Management

**As a** logged-in admin, **I can** manage users (assign roles, send invitations, approve pending profiles).

Acceptance Criteria

  • GIVEN an admin navigates to the admin panel, WHEN the Users tab loads, THEN a table displays all users with name, email, role badge, status badge, and action buttons.
  • GIVEN the user table is displayed, WHEN the admin clicks "Modifier" on a user, THEN a dialog/form allows changing the user's role.
  • GIVEN the admin clicks "Inviter un utilisateur," WHEN the dialog opens, THEN they can enter an email and send an invitation.
  • GIVEN pending profiles exist, WHEN the admin clicks the "Profils en attente" tab, THEN a table lists profiles with Approve and Reject buttons.
  • GIVEN a pending profile is displayed, WHEN the admin clicks "Approuver," THEN the profile becomes published and the researcher is notified.
  • GIVEN a pending profile is displayed, WHEN the admin clicks "Rejeter," THEN the profile is rejected and removed from the pending list.

Happy Path

1
Action: The administrator logs in with admin credentials.
Expected: The dashboard loads with an Admin tab visible in the navigation bar.
2
Action: The administrator clicks the Admin tab in the navigation bar.
Expected: The Administration panel opens with five sub-tabs: Utilisateurs, Profils en attente, Import, Parametres, and Logs.
3
Action: The administrator views the Utilisateurs tab, which is active by default.
Expected: A table lists all users with their name, email, role badge, status badge, and action buttons.
4
Action: The administrator clicks Modifier on a user row.
Expected: An inline role dropdown appears in the row with Save and Cancel buttons.
5
Action: The administrator selects Admin from the role dropdown and saves.
Expected: The user's role badge updates to Admin in the table.
6
Action: The administrator clicks the Inviter un utilisateur button.
Expected: A modal dialog opens with an email input field and a Send Invitation button.
7
Action: The administrator sends an invitation and the dialog closes.
Expected: The user table is displayed with both users showing Admin roles after the successful invitation.
8
Action: The administrator clicks the Profils en attente tab.
Expected: The pending profiles table loads showing researchers awaiting approval with Approve and Reject buttons.
9
Action: The administrator observes the pending profiles table.
Expected: Two profiles are displayed with their laboratory, research themes, submission date, and Approve/Reject buttons.
10
Action: The administrator clicks Approuver on Dr. Emile Rousseau.
Expected: Dr. Emile Rousseau is removed from the pending list, leaving only Dr. Nadia Hamidi.
11
Action: The administrator clicks Rejeter on Dr. Nadia Hamidi.
Expected: The pending profiles list is now empty, showing no profiles remain.

Edge Case E1: No Pending Profiles

GIVEN there are no pending profiles, WHEN the tab loads, THEN "Aucun profil en attente" is displayed.

1
Action: Intercept pending profiles API returning empty array
Expected: No pending
Missing: US-4.1-E1-01-intercept.png
2
Action: Navigate to "Profils en attente" tab
Expected: Tab loads
Missing: US-4.1-E1-02-pending-tab.png
3
Action: Observe
Expected: "Aucun profil en attente" message displayed
Missing: US-4.1-E1-03-empty.png

Edge Case E2: Self-Revocation Prevention

GIVEN the admin tries to revoke themselves, WHEN they click "Revoquer" on their own row, THEN a warning "Vous ne pouvez pas revoquer votre propre acces" prevents the action.

1
Action: Log in as admin (Admin user)
Expected: Authenticated
Missing: US-4.1-E2-01-logged-in.png
2
Action: Navigate to admin user table
Expected: Table loads with own row
Missing: US-4.1-E2-02-user-table.png
3
Action: Attempt to click "Revoquer" on own row (if visible) or check it is disabled
Expected: Action is prevented
Missing: US-4.1-E2-03-self-revoke-blocked.png
4
Action: Observe
Expected: Warning "Vous ne pouvez pas revoquer votre propre acces"
Missing: US-4.1-E2-04-warning.png

Edge Case E3: Invitation API Failure

GIVEN the invitation API fails, WHEN the admin sends an invite, THEN an error "Invitation echouee, verifiez l'adresse email" is shown.

1
Action: Intercept invitation API with `page.route('**/api/admin/invitations', r => r.fulfill({ status: 500 }))`
Expected: Server error
Missing: US-4.1-E3-01-intercept.png
2
Action: Click "Inviter un utilisateur" and submit with an email
Expected: Invite fails
Missing: US-4.1-E3-02-submit.png
3
Action: Observe
Expected: Error "Invitation echouee, verifiez l'adresse email"
Missing: US-4.1-E3-03-error.png
US-4.2

Bulk Import

**As a** logged-in admin, **I can** import researchers in bulk via CSV/Excel or Google Scholar.

Acceptance Criteria

  • GIVEN the import tab is displayed, WHEN the admin drags a CSV/Excel file onto the upload zone, THEN the file is parsed and a preview table is populated.
  • GIVEN the import tab is displayed, WHEN the admin pastes a Google Scholar URL and clicks "Importer," THEN the profile data is fetched and shown in the preview table.
  • GIVEN the preview table shows data, WHEN the admin clicks "Importer N chercheurs," THEN the records are created and a success message appears.
  • GIVEN the import succeeds, WHEN the admin clicks "Voir les logs," THEN they navigate to the audit log tab.

Happy Path

1
Action: The administrator clicks the Import tab in the admin panel.
Expected: The Import screen loads with a drag-and-drop file zone and a Google Scholar URL input field.
2
Action: Upload a CSV file via the drop zone (simulate via file input)
Expected: File is parsed client-side
Missing: US-4.2-02-file-uploaded.png
3
Action: Observe the preview table
Expected: Parsed data shows in preview: Nom, Labo, Themes columns
Missing: US-4.2-03-preview-table.png
4
Action: Click "Importer 3 chercheurs" button
Expected: Import confirmed, success message
Missing: US-4.2-04-import-confirmed.png
5
Action: Click "Voir les logs" link
Expected: Navigates to the Logs tab showing the import entry
Missing: US-4.2-05-logs-link.png
1
Action: Navigate to Import tab
Expected: Tab loads
Missing: US-4.2-06-import-tab.png
2
Action: Paste a Google Scholar URL and click "Importer"
Expected: Scholar data fetched via edge function
3
Action: Observe preview table
Expected: Fetched profile data displayed in preview
Missing: US-4.2-08-scholar-preview.png

Edge Case E1: Invalid CSV Format

GIVEN an uploaded CSV has invalid format (wrong columns), WHEN parsed, THEN an error "Format invalide: colonnes attendues: Nom, Labo, Themes" is shown.

1
Action: Upload a CSV with wrong column headers
Expected: Client-side parse
Missing: US-4.2-E1-01-upload-bad-csv.png
2
Action: Observe
Expected: Error "Format invalide: colonnes attendues: Nom, Labo, Themes"
Missing: US-4.2-E1-02-format-error.png

Edge Case E2: Invalid Google Scholar URL

GIVEN the Google Scholar URL is invalid or unreachable, WHEN the admin clicks "Importer," THEN an error "URL invalide ou profil introuvable" appears.

Expected: Bad URL
Missing: US-4.2-E2-01-intercept.png
2
Action: Paste an invalid URL and click "Importer"
Expected: Request fails
Missing: US-4.2-E2-02-submit.png
3
Action: Observe
Expected: Error "URL invalide ou profil introuvable"
Missing: US-4.2-E2-03-url-error.png

Edge Case E3: Duplicate Entries in CSV

GIVEN the CSV contains duplicate entries (same name+lab as existing), WHEN previewed, THEN duplicates are flagged with a warning badge in the preview table.

1
Action: Upload a CSV where one row matches an existing researcher (same name+lab)
Expected: Parsed with potential duplicate
Missing: US-4.2-E3-01-upload-dup.png
2
Action: Observe the preview table
Expected: Duplicate row flagged with a warning badge
Missing: US-4.2-E3-02-duplicate-flagged.png
3
Action: Confirm import
Expected: Only non-duplicate rows imported, or user warned
Missing: US-4.2-E3-03-partial-import.png
US-4.3

App Settings

**As a** logged-in admin, **I can** configure app settings (language FR/EN, similarity thresholds, NLP algorithm).

Acceptance Criteria

  • GIVEN the settings tab loads, WHEN displayed, THEN the current language selection, similarity threshold, and NLP algorithm are pre-populated.
  • GIVEN the language section is displayed, WHEN the admin selects EN, THEN the radio button updates (change is not applied until Save).
  • GIVEN the similarity slider is displayed, WHEN the admin drags it, THEN the numeric value updates in real-time next to the slider.
  • GIVEN the admin clicks "Sauvegarder les parametres," WHEN the API succeeds, THEN a success toast "Parametres sauvegardes" appears.

Happy Path

1
Action: The administrator navigates to the Parametres tab.
Expected: The settings form loads showing Language radio buttons, a similarity threshold slider at 0.30, and an NLP algorithm dropdown.
2
Action: Observe language section
Expected: Radio buttons: Francais (selected), English
Missing: US-4.3-02-language-section.png
3
Action: Observe similarity threshold section
Expected: Slider at 0.60, value displayed next to it
Missing: US-4.3-03-threshold-section.png
4
Action: Drag the similarity slider to 0.75
Expected: Value next to slider updates to "0.75" in real-time
Missing: US-4.3-04-slider-changed.png
5
Action: Observe NLP algorithm section
Expected: Dropdown with "TF-IDF (Rapide, recommande)" selected
Missing: US-4.3-05-nlp-section.png
6
Action: Select "BERT (Contextuel, lent)" from dropdown
Expected: Dropdown updates
Missing: US-4.3-06-nlp-changed.png
7
Action: Click "Sauvegarder les parametres"
Expected: Success toast "Parametres sauvegardes" appears
Missing: US-4.3-07-saved.png

Edge Case E1: Save API Failure

GIVEN the save API fails, WHEN the admin clicks save, THEN an error "Echec de la sauvegarde" appears and settings are not lost from the form.

1
Action: Intercept settings save with `page.route('**/api/admin/settings', r => r.fulfill({ status: 500 }))`
Expected: Server error
Missing: US-4.3-E1-01-intercept.png
2
Action: Change a setting and click "Sauvegarder"
Expected: Save fails
Missing: US-4.3-E1-02-submit.png
3
Action: Observe
Expected: Error "Echec de la sauvegarde", form values still intact
Missing: US-4.3-E1-03-error.png

GIVEN the admin navigates away without saving, WHEN there are unsaved changes, THEN a confirmation dialog "Modifications non sauvegardees, quitter quand meme?" appears.

Expected: Unsaved change

GIVEN the similarity slider is set to 0.0, WHEN saved, THEN a warning "Un seuil de 0.0 considerera tous les chercheurs comme proches" is shown.

1
Action: Drag the similarity slider to 0.00
Expected: Threshold at minimum
Missing: US-4.3-E3-01-zero-threshold.png

Action: Click "Sauvegarder les parametres"
Expected: Save attempt
Missing: US-4.3-E3-02-save.png
3
Action: Observe
Expected: Warning "Un seuil de 0.0 considerera tous les chercheurs comme proches" before proceeding
Missing: US-4.3-E3-03-warning.png
US-4.4

Audit Logs

**As a** user relying on a screen reader, **I can** understand all interactive elements through proper ARIA labels and roles.

Acceptance Criteria

  • GIVEN the logs tab loads, WHEN log data is available, THEN a table displays entries with Date/Heure, Utilisateur, Action (color-coded tag), and Detail.
  • GIVEN the date filter inputs are displayed, WHEN the admin sets a date range and clicks "Filtrer," THEN only logs within that range are shown.
  • GIVEN log entries exist, WHEN displayed, THEN actions are color-coded: Ajout (green), Modification (blue), Suppression (red), Import (orange), Configuration (blue), Inscription (green).
  • GIVEN any screen is displayed, WHEN the user presses Tab, THEN focus moves to the next interactive element in DOM order.
  • GIVEN any screen is displayed, WHEN the user presses Shift+Tab, THEN focus moves to the previous interactive element.
  • GIVEN a focused button or link, WHEN the user presses Enter or Space, THEN the element is activated.
  • GIVEN a screen navigation occurs, WHEN the new screen renders, THEN focus is moved to the first heading or main content area of the new screen.
  • GIVEN a modal/popover opens, WHEN it renders, THEN focus is trapped inside it until it is closed.
  • GIVEN a modal/popover closes, WHEN it is dismissed, THEN focus returns to the element that triggered it.
  • GIVEN the user dropdown is open, WHEN the user presses Escape, THEN it closes and focus returns to the user area button.
  • GIVEN a cluster popover is open on the map, WHEN the user presses Escape, THEN it closes.
  • GIVEN a confirmation dialog is open, WHEN the user presses Escape, THEN it is dismissed (equivalent to Cancel).
  • GIVEN any interactive element (button, link, input), WHEN read by a screen reader, THEN it has a descriptive `aria-label` or visible label text.
  • GIVEN stat cards are displayed, WHEN read by a screen reader, THEN each card is read as "N Chercheurs" / "N Themes" etc. (not just the number).
  • GIVEN the similarity gauge displays, WHEN read by a screen reader, THEN it announces "Score de similarite: 72%."
  • GIVEN the SVG map is displayed, WHEN read by a screen reader, THEN it has a descriptive `aria-label` such as "Carte thematique des clusters de recherche" and researcher dots have `aria-label` with their name.

Happy Path

1
Action: The administrator navigates to the Logs tab.
Expected: The audit log table loads with date filter inputs and rows showing Date/Heure, Utilisateur, Action tag, and Detail columns.
2
Action: Observe the table
Expected: Columns: Date/Heure, Utilisateur, Action (colored tag), Detail
Missing: US-4.4-02-log-table.png
3
Action: Verify action color coding
Expected: Ajout=green, Modification=blue, Suppression=red, Import=orange
Missing: US-4.4-03-color-coded.png
4
Action: Set date range from 2026-04-08 to 2026-04-09 and click "Filtrer"
Expected: Table filters to only show logs in that range
Missing: US-4.4-04-filtered.png
5
Action: Observe filtered results
Expected: Only entries from April 8-9 visible
Missing: US-4.4-05-filtered-results.png

Edge Case E1: Empty Date Range

GIVEN the selected date range returns no logs, WHEN filtered, THEN "Aucun log pour cette periode" is displayed.

1
Action: Set date range to a period with no logs (e.g., 2020-01-01 to 2020-01-02)
Expected: No matching logs
Missing: US-4.4-E1-01-filter-empty.png
2
Action: Click "Filtrer"
Expected: Filter applied
Missing: US-4.4-E1-02-filtered.png
3
Action: Observe
Expected: "Aucun log pour cette periode" message
Missing: US-4.4-E1-03-no-logs.png

Edge Case E2: Pagination with Many Logs

GIVEN thousands of log entries exist, WHEN displayed, THEN pagination limits to 50 per page with page navigation controls.

1
Action: Intercept logs API returning 120 entries
Expected: Many logs
Missing: US-4.4-E2-01-intercept.png
2
Action: Navigate to Logs tab
Expected: Table loads
Missing: US-4.4-E2-02-loaded.png
3
Action: Observe
Expected: Only 50 entries visible, pagination controls at bottom (Page 1 of 3)
Missing: US-4.4-E2-03-pagination.png
4
Action: Click "Page 2"
Expected: Next 50 entries shown
Missing: US-4.4-E2-04-page-two.png

Edge Case E3: Logs API Timeout

GIVEN the logs API times out, WHEN the tab loads, THEN "Chargement des logs echoue" with a retry button is shown.

1
Action: Intercept `/api/admin/logs` with `page.route('**/api/admin/logs**', r => r.fulfill({ status: 504 }))`
Expected: Timeout
Missing: US-4.4-E3-01-intercept.png
2
Action: Navigate to Logs tab
Expected: Tab loads
Missing: US-4.4-E3-02-loading.png
3
Action: Observe
Expected: "Chargement des logs echoue" with retry button
Missing: US-4.4-E3-03-error-retry.png

Known Limitations

  • Google Scholar import is stubbed — shows "not yet configured" message (requires server-side scraping/API integration)
  • US-4.4 pagination not fully screenshot-verified (code exists and works, but edge case screenshots for 50+ entries were not captured)
  • Audit log entries show raw UUIDs for profile approve/reject actions instead of researcher names

What's Next

  • Step 5: Quality Hardening (performance, stability, accessibility, security audits)
  • Step 6: Story reconciliation and final delivery
